name: OM Ceramic Atomizer & Cap
summary: The AirVape OM ceramic atomizer and gunmetal cap set is designed to restore performance and functionality.
description: The AirVape OM ceramic atomizer and gunmetal cap set is designed to restore performance and functionality. Ideal for replacing worn parts and maintaining consistent use. Built with durable, heat-resistant materials, the atomizer delivers reliable performance while the cap ensures a secure fit. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
